description: Canonical decision registry — all architectural decisions that AI agents MUST respect. Agents must check this file before modifying any related code.

topics.title: Authorization: OpenFGA Zanzibar Migration
topics.summary: Keycloak (authn) + OpenFGA (authz engine) + permission-service (OpenFGA Hub: tuple sync, version mgmt, /authz/me+/check+/explain, role CRUD) + Hibernate @Filter + RLS (data enforcement). Other services use OpenFgaAuthzService directly (no HTTP to hub for checks).

topics.title: Security: Local Development Auth Rules
topics.summary: Local profilde JWT doğrulaması YOK. Login Keycloak'tan. permitAll sadece CI için.

rules.read_before_modify: Any AI agent MUST read this registry and the relevant topic file BEFORE modifying files in the topic's scope.
rules.no_silent_revert: Decisions with status FINAL cannot be silently reverted. A DCP (Decision Change Proposal) must be created and approved by the user.
rules.tried_alternatives: Rejected alternatives have a tried_count. Do NOT retry them without explicit user approval.
